_doc.purpose: Localization companion for dictionary_UI_sex.json. Holds en-us entries added/updated after the source file's zh-cn text was authored, so the source file itself doesn't need to be touched again for translation-only changes.
_doc.ui_debug_tooltip2_note: zh-cn source added a 7th line (pregnancy rate x100%). The stale (6-line) en-us entry was removed from dictionary_UI_sex.json and replaced here. Note: this key also has an intentional, unrelated '' (empty) definition in dictionary_UI_safeOnly.json, used for the safe-mode/SFW build variant - that is not a collision, since scr_System_Serializer.LoadDefs skips nsfw-named files in safe mode and skips '*safeOnly*' files otherwise, so only one of the two is ever loaded.

en-us.ui_debug_tooltip2:
6. Global Ejaculation Volume X5
7. Pregnancy Chance x100%
en-us.charaDetail_panel_bodyexp_cycle_none_too: This character is incapable of pregnancy.
en-us.charaDetail_panel_cycle_current: Current cycle expected to last $count$ days
en-us.charaDetail_panel_cycle_ovumCount_toolti: If ovulation doesn't succeed, the ovulation rate carries over to the next cycle.
en-us.management_faction_managedBaby_tooltip: Babies don't consume food, but someone must be assigned time each day to care for them (not yet implemented).
